pinyin: ji4 lai2 zhi1 , ze2 an1 zhi1
defs: Since they have come, we should make them comfortable (idiom). Since we're here, take it easy.
Since this is so, we should accept it.
Now we have come, let's stay and take the rough with the smooth.
If you can't do anything to prevent it, you might as well sit back and enjoy it.
to forget and not bear recriminations (idiom); to let bygones be bygones
There is no point in crying over spilt milk.

pinyin: ji4 you3 jin1 ri4 he2 bi4 dang1 chu1
defs: see 早知今日何必當初|早知今日何必当初[zao3 zhi1 jin1 ri4 he2 bi4 dang1 chu1]
since; as; this being the case

trad: 既要當婊子又要立牌坊
simp: 既要当婊子又要立牌坊
pinyin: ji4 yao4 dang1 biao3 zi5 you4 yao4 li4 pai2 fang1
defs: see 又想當婊子又想立牌坊|又想当婊子又想立牌坊[you4 xiang3 dang1 biao3 zi5 you4 xiang3 li4 pai2 fang1]
